title: Per-test Vec allocations in eval hot path
description: eval_header_test, eval_address_test, and eval_envelope_test each collect forms into Vec<&Form>, then extract_match_type allocates another Vec<&Form>, then extract_comparator allocates another, then extract_address_part allocates another. That is 4 Vec heap allocations per test invocation on slices of typically 4-8 elements. These are called on every evaluate() for every header/address/envelope test clause. Fix: scan the slice by index in a single pass, recording tag positions and string-list positions without constructing intermediate Vecs. Expected impact: eliminates 3-4 small allocations per test per message, measurable on message-processing workloads.
